DASHBOARD.TITLE: Threat Overview

LOGIN.SIGNIN_DESC: Enter your credentials to access the SOC
LOGIN.FORGOT_DESC: Enter your email to receive a reset link
LOGIN.MFA_DESC: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
LOGIN.SECURITY_NOTICE: For security, we've temporarily blocked access. If you've forgotten your password, try resetting it or contact an administrator.

MSG_ACCOUNT_CREATED: Account created! Please check your email to verify your account.
MSG_VERIFICATION_SENT_ALREADY: A verification email was already sent. Please check your inbox or try resending.
MSG_RESET_LINK_SENT: If that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.
ERR_FILL_ALL: Please fill in all required fields.
ERR_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
ERR_NOT_VERIFIED: Your account is not verified. Please check your email inbox.
ERR_LOCKED: Account is temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts.
ERR_INVALID_MFA: The verification code is incorrect or expired. Please check your authenticator app.
ERR_PASSWORD_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
ERR_RESEND_FAILED: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again later.
ERR_REGISTRATION_FAILED: Registration failed. Email may already exist or the server is unavailable.

TFA.TITLE: Two-Factor Authentication
TFA.DESC: Protect your account with an extra security layer.
TFA.STEP1: 1. Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
TFA.STEP2: 2. Enter the 6-digit code generated by the app.
TFA.DISABLE_DESC: Enter your current password to confirm disabling 2FA.

SETTINGS.DELETE_DESC: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
SETTINGS.ARCH_DESC: RiskTrace is built using Angular 18, Spring Boot, and MongoDB. The anomaly detection engine is powered by Python ML microservices using Isolation Forest algorithms.
